programme.title: Spring Baking Championship
programme.desc: Host Jesse Palmer springs into the season with a Mother's Day celebration; for the bakers to show Mom how much she means to them, they create bouquets of tulips and rosé-infused desserts before the judges decide who moves on to the finale.

programme.title: Spring Baking Championship
programme.desc: Jesse Palmer challenges the bakers to make soda shop cupcakes and extra shaggy cakes.

programme.title: Relief from Inflammation
programme.desc: Connie Craig-Carrol & Founder Ken Meares investigates Omega XL, the ultimate all-natural solution for joint pain from inflammation.

programme.title: 1776 - 2026 250th Anniversary Quarter Celebration Program
programme.desc: 2026 will be one of the most historic years ever in U.S. coinage; join your host Mike Mezack to learn about the incredible U.S. Quarter program and get a chance at an exclusive P&D Roll!

programme.title: Food Truck Nation
programme.desc: A food truck owned by an actual Italian prince, Prince Emanuele di Savoia; winning over locals with authentic handmade pastas, like bucatini with lemon sauce; Brad travels to Minneapolis.

programme.title: Food Truck Nation
programme.sub-title: Biscuit Sandwiches, Smoked Wings and Sweet Hand Pies
programme.desc: A fried chicken biscuit with bourbon-bacon jam and a brisket biscuit sandwich with cherry cola barbecue sauce; hickory-smoked fried chicken wings slathered in homemade Asian hot sauce; dessert hand pies, like the strawberry french toast creation.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Food Truck Nation
programme.desc: Soft tortilla tacos on That Awesome Taco Truck; '80s throwback taco with a cheese quesadilla base; the lobster roll taco; reimagined Indian food; cardamom chai Drumsticks and methi mirthi shrimp; Japanese-style, fish-shaped waffles.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Food Truck Nation
programme.desc: Making the classic pairing of burger and fries bigger and bolder; jambalaya fries and Hello Burger, an oversized beef patty stuffed with Cajun grilled shrimp; Neapolitan-style pizzas; Belgian waffles topped with cookie butter and whipped cream.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Food Paradise
programme.desc: An extra-crispy menu piled high with pork rind brisket nachos, spicy Korean double-fried chicken, authentic British fish and chips, inventive egg rolls, country-fried Wagyu burgers, fried soft-shell crab and some creative cookies.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Food Paradise
programme.desc: A towering torta served on a shovel, a super stack of pancakes, softball-sized meatballs, plenty of pastrami and more.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Food Paradise
programme.desc: Seafood dishes that are making waves with fresh seafood, sandwiches and chowder gravy.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Food Paradise
programme.desc: Restaurants go hog wild, serving up German-style pork shanks in Philadelphia, pork-powered pizzas in Boston, bourbon-glazed pork chops in St. Rose, La., and the skyscraper-sized Hogzilla in Ridgefield, Conn.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food
programme.desc: From the Atlantic seaboard to the Pacific coast, down deep in the bayou and high in the Rockies, Roger travels America to reel in the fifteen very best seafood dishes.

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food
programme.desc: Roger Mooking counts the best Italian dishes in the U.S.; chefs share authentic recipes and tips for making an Italian feast.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Man's Greatest Food
programme.desc: 12 of the best comfort foods served in restaurants across America; learning everything there is to know about making macaroni and cheese, spaghetti and meatballs, pork chops and gravy, chicken and waffles, chili and more.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Bacon and Bourbon Fest in Wellington, Fla.; Stuffed Crust Bacon-Za; Peanut Butter Pork Donuts that hit the sweet and salty spot; ThurtenE Carnival at Washington University in St. Louis, where he gets his fill of delicious school spirit.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah Cappe starts his midway adventure with the challenge burrito at the Big Butler Fair in Pennsylvania; it's off to the State Fair Meadowlands in New Jersey to sample jibaritos and the Macoupin County Fair in Illinois for the breakfast shoe.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah starts the day with breakfast nachos at the Ft. Worth Stock Show and Rodeo in Texas, visits the North Florida Fair in Tallahassee for street corn fritters and stops by the Riverside County Fair in Indio, Calif., for a colorful frozen treat.

programme.title: Carnival Eats
programme.desc: Noah Cappe heads to the Houston Rodeo for their Cajun smoked tater; Noah visits the Clark County Fair in Nevada for some home cooking on a bun and goes back in time at the Medieval Fair of Norman, Okla., for the coronation of the crown cannoli.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Some Southern hospitality, with comfort food like fried chicken and peach cobbler, to soul food and sweet tea in Atlanta.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew unveils Sicily's edible icons; known for artisanal comfort food such as crunchy fried rice balls, thick crust pizza, irresistible creamy cannoli and a pasta that will make people sing, Sicilian cuisine is a timeless treasure made with passion.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: From sweet and savory BBQ pork and enormously artful mountains of lobster to herbaceous Jamaican flatbreads and sinfully gooey butter tarts, Andrew showcases the diverse eats of Toronto, Canada.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern heads to Madrid to reveal the most famous foods in Spain's capital; sweet and succulent roasted piglet to fried calamari sandwiches and tapas, Madrid transforms food into a true culinary and social experience.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern highlights the culinary treasures of Venice, Italy, including paper-thin cuts of beef Carpaccio, espresso-soaked tiramisu and cuttlefish stewed in its own ink.

programme.title: Bizarre Foods: Delicious Destinations
programme.desc: Andrew Zimmern explores the big and bold flavors that define Dallas -- from comforting chicken-fried steak and sweet, creamy pecan pie to hearty tortilla soup and steak aged for 240 days.

programme.title: Man v. Food
programme.desc: Casey's quest for America's best bites has taken him from coast to coast, and it's about time to induct the best BBQ into the "Man v. Food" Hall of Fame.

programme.title: Unique Sweets
programme.desc: Rodeo Donut prepares brioche doughnuts with a mix of spicy and sweet; Amandine Bakeshop serves French-inspired sweets like rose-flavored croissants; Hello Robin serves cookies that incorporate other treats like s'mores and cinnamon rolls.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Unique Sweets
programme.desc: An underground donut spot called Donut Diva in Astoria, Queens, is frying up outrageous cake donut creations and baking unique coffee cake; Eggloo in Manhattan builds an edible work of ice cream art, nestled into a warm, puffy, egg waffle cone.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Unique Sweets
programme.desc: The Salty Donut offers a buttery 24-hour brioche doughnut dough and serve topping combinations like key lime pie and peach bourbon; L.A. Sweetz offers a coconut cake dipped in dark rum and topped with dulce de leche buttercream.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Unique Sweets
programme.desc: Snow Monster in Long Beach offers ice cream creations such as macaron ice cream sandwiches and drinks topped with clouds of cotton candy; Santa Ana's Cauldron Ice Cream specializes in small batches made with liquid nitrogen served in waffle cones.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Cake Hunters
programme.desc: Alicia and Jackson are chefs with picky palates and dreams of a working waterfall cake but can't agree on cake flavor; designers are challenged with designing a cake and finding flavors that please both the bride and the groom.

programme.title: Cake Hunters
programme.desc: Victor, Kevin, Keith and Jason Furtick are identical quadruplets celebrating their 27th birthday; each of these brothers have a different idea of cake design perfection; three top bakers take on the challenge of winning all four brothers over.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Cake Hunters
programme.desc: Nijah and Dwayne are preparing to bring their baby girl into world, and Nijah's mom, Tish, is preparing to go all out on the baby shower; the parents want plenty of bling to welcome their future star, while grandma wants a classic baby shower cake.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Cake Hunters
programme.desc: Sisters Treava and Raya cannot agree on a cake for their family's 25th annual reunion; Treava is searching for an elegant representation of their home state of Maryland, while Raya dreams of a family tree cake that pays tribute to their grandfather.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Food Paradise
programme.desc: Great grub gets even better when it's dipped, drenched or dunked; the picks include elevated grilled cheeses and super sauces, a flaming hot burger, breakfast corn dogs, a super sundae, a French dip and queso-drenched everything.

programme.title: Food Paradise
programme.desc: Pizza pretzels and duck empanadas handle the savory side, while cheesecake waffle sundaes and a big banana pudding bring the sweet.

programme.title: Food Paradise
programme.desc: Top picks featuring a New Jersey drive-in slinging sky-high burgers, a New Orleans doughnut shop turning diner dinner classics into quick-bite hand-helds, and a Southern California spot serving decadent seafood fries.

programme.title: Unique Eats
programme.desc: Why not sample everything on the menu when it comes in the form of small bites?

programme.title: Unique Eats
programme.desc: The best asian dishes.

programme.title: Unique Eats
programme.desc: Chef Paul Qui of East Side King in Austin; chef Matt Lightner of New York City's Atera; an innovator keeps it kosher in Philadelphia; a couple's Los Angeles restaurant serves pan-Asian fare.

programme.title: Unique Eats
programme.desc: Fried chicken and fried green tomatoes; old school sandwiches; family seafood tradition.

programme.title: Unique Eats
programme.desc: Heavy-Metal inspired burgers piled high with the works; mouth-watering, stick-to-your-ribs barbecue in Brooklyn; a downtown L.A. hotspot taking American desserts to new heights; the creamiest, craziest ice cream creations you can fit on a cone.

programme.title: Unique Eats
programme.desc: A pioneer chef in molecular gastronomy pushes the boundaries between food, science and art; Jose Andres offers up a collection of magical dining experiences; an inside glimpse at an exclusive Hollywood speakeasy.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer
programme.desc: Breakfast isn't the only time to enjoy a delicious doughnut; Eddie Jackson runs through a full day of sweet, savory and surprising doughnuts for every meal.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson rounds up a full day of meals that have one thing in common, being forged by fire; he goes beyond the average grilled meal with flame-cooked breakfast, roasted meats and even fiery desserts.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer
programme.desc: Eddie Jackson finds the best seafood by the seashore; whether it's baked, broiled, fried or served in a shell or on a bun, these fresh-out-of-the-water wonders have hungry diners wishing they were seeing waves.

programme.title: Yum and Yummer
programme.desc: From Cuban cuisine to South Korea's legendary dishes, Eddie Jackson brings a taste of delicious, authentic flavors from around the world to please the taste buds.

programme.desc: Chef Ramsay heads to Philadelphia to try and help the owners of the Hot Potato Cafe.
